title: Slowfall Timer
description: Notifies you when the other player runs out of slow falling. Used mainly for the Crystal PvP gamemode.
body:
**Slowfall Timer**

This mod is a lightweight utility that doesn't interfere with gameplay. When you hit a player with slow falling, I hidden timer starts for 30 seconds, once this timer ends it will let you know in chat. This is used for Crystal PvP slow falling crossbows.

  - **Compatible with Minecraft 1.21 and above**.

  1. When you hit someone with slow falling, the timer will automatically start.
  2. Wait for the enemy to run out of slow falling.
  3. You can configure the timer in the source code.
